scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && npm run build:assets
scripts.build:assets: node --input-type=module -e "import { mkdirSync, copyFileSync } from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist/interface', { recursive: true }); copyFileSync('src/interface/nexus-demo-page.html', 'dist/interface/nexus-demo-page.html');"
scripts.select:example: node src/cli.js select --input examples/auth-context.json --focus "jwt middleware expired session validation" --min-score 0.25 --format text
scripts.teach:example: node src/cli.js teach --input examples/auth-context.json --task "Improve auth middleware" --objective "Teach why validation runs before route handlers" --changed-files "src/auth/middleware.ts,test/auth/middleware.test.ts" --project learning-context-system --no-recall --min-score 0.25 --format text
scripts.teach:memory:example: node src/cli.js teach --workspace . --task "Summarize teach recall architecture" --objective "Teach how Engram recall is injected into teach" --changed-files "src/memory/teach-recall.js,src/cli/app.js" --project learning-context-system --recall-query "teach recall" --token-budget 520 --max-chunks 8 --min-score 0.25 --format text
scripts.readme:example: node src/cli.js readme --workspace . --focus "learning context cli noise cancellation" --output README.LEARN.md --format text
scripts.ingest-security:example: node src/cli.js ingest-security --input examples/prowler-findings.sample.json --status-filter non-pass --output test-output/security-chunks.json --format text
scripts.recall:example: node src/cli.js recall --project learning-context-system --query "teach recall" --scope project --limit 5 --format text
scripts.playground:select: node src/cli.js select --input examples/auth-context.json --focus "jwt middleware expired session validation" --min-score 0.25 --format text
scripts.playground:select:debug: node src/cli.js select --input examples/auth-context.json --focus "jwt middleware expired session validation" --min-score 0.25 --debug --format text
scripts.playground:teach:synthetic: node src/cli.js teach --input examples/auth-context.json --task "Improve auth middleware" --objective "Teach why validation runs before route handlers" --changed-files "src/auth/middleware.ts,test/auth/middleware.test.ts" --project learning-context-system --no-recall --min-score 0.25 --format text
scripts.playground:teach:memory: node src/cli.js teach --workspace . --task "Summarize teach recall architecture" --objective "Teach how Engram recall is injected into teach" --changed-files "src/memory/teach-recall.js,src/cli/app.js" --project learning-context-system --recall-query "teach recall" --token-budget 520 --max-chunks 8 --min-score 0.25 --format text
scripts.playground:teach:memory:debug: node src/cli.js teach --workspace . --task "Summarize teach recall architecture" --objective "Teach how Engram recall is injected into teach" --changed-files "src/memory/teach-recall.js,src/cli/app.js" --project learning-context-system --recall-query "teach recall" --token-budget 520 --max-chunks 8 --min-score 0.25 --debug --format text
scripts.playground:readme: node src/cli.js readme --workspace . --focus "learning context cli noise cancellation" --output README.LEARN.md --format text
scripts.playground:recall: node src/cli.js recall --project learning-context-system --query "teach recall" --scope project --limit 5 --format text
scripts.playground:recall:debug: node src/cli.js recall --project learning-context-system --query "teach recall" --scope project --limit 5 --debug --format text
scripts.vertical:ts:select: node src/cli.js select --workspace examples/typescript-backend --focus "auth middleware request boundary expired session" --min-score 0.25 --format text
scripts.vertical:ts:teach: node src/cli.js teach --workspace examples/typescript-backend --task "Harden auth middleware" --objective "Teach request-boundary validation in a TypeScript server" --changed-files "src/auth/middleware.ts,test/auth/middleware.test.ts" --project typescript-backend-vertical --no-recall --min-score 0.25 --format text
scripts.vertical:ts:teach:debug: node src/cli.js teach --workspace examples/typescript-backend --task "Harden auth middleware" --objective "Teach request-boundary validation in a TypeScript server" --changed-files "src/auth/middleware.ts,test/auth/middleware.test.ts" --project typescript-backend-vertical --no-recall --min-score 0.25 --debug --format text
scripts.vertical:ts:teach:memory: node src/cli.js teach --workspace examples/typescript-backend --task "Harden auth middleware" --objective "Teach request-boundary validation in a TypeScript server" --changed-files "src/auth/middleware.ts,test/auth/middleware.test.ts" --project typescript-backend-vertical --recall-query "auth validation order" --token-budget 520 --max-chunks 6 --min-score 0.25 --format text
scripts.vertical:ts:readme: node src/cli.js readme --workspace examples/typescript-backend --focus "typescript backend auth middleware request boundary" --output examples/typescript-backend/README.LEARN.md --format text
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run build:smoke
